name: Barbecued Squid
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with a Thai sweet/hot chili sauce. This dish is excellent and was one of the best meals I had in Bangkok.
2. Use fresh ingredients and simple cooking for the best results when grilling seafood.
3. Prepare a fire using firewood or Mexican charcoal started from paper and kindling.
4. Skewer the squid rings.
5. Grill the rings over red-hot coals for 2 to 3 minutes per side, turning occasionally until they are browned.
6. Serve hot with lemon-garlic butter.
NOTE: Avoid using commercial charcoal and lighter fluid, as they can impart an oily flavor to food and are less healthy than using hardwood or Mexican charcoal.
